location: Guaranteed drop from the Omenkiller & Miranda the Blighted Bloom duo boss at the end of Perfumer's Grotto, a small dungeon in Altus Plateau. (Regular Omenkiller enemies patrolling Volcano Manor can also drop it, but only by chance.)
tactics: Perfumer's Grotto entrance is east of Altus Highway Junction grace, guarded by a large poison flower enemy; there's a Perfumer's Grotto grace right at the entrance
The duo fight pits a fire-wielding Omenkiller against you alongside Miranda, who spreads poison/rot clouds — try to separate and drop Miranda first so you aren't fighting both in a cloud
Alternative source: Omenkiller enemies inside Volcano Manor (Mt. Gelmir) carry the same weapon but drop it only by random chance
lore: A brutal cleaver assembled from a line of hacked-off Omen horns bolted along its edge. The jagged, broken horn fragments are sharp enough to leave wounds that keep on bleeding.

builds.name: Bleed/Arcane build
builds.why: Innate 55 Hemorrhage buildup, the only Greataxe with built-in bleed, which scales further with an Occult affinity for Arcane builds.

builds.name: Strength/Dex quality build
builds.why: D/D scaling on a mid-weight Greataxe with the multi-hit Wild Strikes skill for sustained pressure.
